projects.title: CallAI – Conversational Compliance & Counterfactual Analytics
projects.description: Scalable compliance-analysis pipeline with FFmpeg-based audio chunking, WhisperX diarisation, temporal segmentation, and GNN-backed discourse graphs enabling counterfactual reasoning over call trajectories. Incorporates semantic search over vector embeddings using FAISS for retrieval-augmented policy checks. Research tracks: causal explainability, dynamic violation detection under domain shift, privacy-preserving dialogue attribution.

projects.title: PATE-GAN – Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation
projects.description: Implemented PATE-GAN with teacher–student aggregation under ε-differential privacy. Quantified privacy–utility tradeoffs and benchmarked mixed-type relational synthesis against canonical GAN baselines.

projects.title: NodesBook – Jupyter like Polyglot Notebook
projects.description: Jupyter like notebook supporting polyglot code cells (JS/Python), persistent execution state, Shadcn UI, Monaco editor integration, module-level isolation and extensible kernel abstractions for offline computation.

projects.title: SeyCodes – LeetCode-Style Judge with Remote Execution
projects.description: Competitive-programming platform with remote sandboxed execution, container isolation and latency-aware judging. Provides DSA problem curation, multi-language runtimes and secure evaluation pipelines mirroring LeetCode ergonomics.

projects.title: Physics Engines – Interactive Rigid-Body Simulation
projects.description: Browser-native rigid-body simulations using custom numerical integrators, collision response and constraint solvers, emphasizing numerical stability, continuous collision detection, and interactive force application.
